name: Adaptive Plate
description: Taking an identical Type of Damage twice will activate a temporary holy bubble that grants Damage Reduction. Gain additional Damage Reduction against the specific Damage Types that triggered it.

name: Aggressive Personality
description: Finishers of Hammers in specific that slam the ground gains a Damage Boost, larger Hitbox, and Taunts on hit.

name: Air Barrier
description: Release a small shockwave of Air around yourself when Blocking an attack. Has a Proc Coefficient and no Cooldown.

name: Air Pressure
description: Dealing Air Damage builds up the Buff Air Pressure, the maximum of which scales on perk amount.

name: Apollo Boost
description: Using a Rune launches you vertically with a shockwave. Enemies hit by the shockwave are Taunted. The shockwave counts as Rune Damage.

name: Artillery Mage
description: Your LMB's and RMB's are replaced with ranged blasts and beams.

name: Barbed Flurry
description: Reapplying Bleed on enemies already Bleeding also deals a small amount of Damage, which scales on your Physical and Dexterity Boosts.

name: Barbskin
description: Take heavily reduced damage from Bleed and gain Damage Reduction during so. Inflicting Bleed will cause yourself to Bleed for 5 seconds. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Basic Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB as a multi-hit Finisher.

name: Bastion Ballista
description: Gain a Neutral Status called Arrows, Hitting an opponent from longer ranges will shoot an arrow at them, the amount increasing the further you are. Scales on Dexterity and Earth, with a 0.1 second Cooldown. Arrows restore after not firing for a bit.

name: Bastion Bless
description: All Buffs you gain or grant are granted a potency buff. Additionally, healing grants either Regeneration or Reinforce at a low chance.

name: Beastial Rage
description: On kill or Poisebreak, gain Rage, remove all Debuffs, and slightly heal. Rage now increases your movement speed.

name: Bellowing Ember
description: At below a certain HP threshold, gain a Damage Boost with a chance to apply Burn when dealing any Damage. Fire Damage in specific gains yet another Damage Boost.

name: Berserking Strength
description: Gain a hefty Attack Speed boost with Unbalanced Weaponry alongside a slight Damage Boost.

name: Blastshield
description: Release a shockwave of Earth upon taking Damage. Has a Cooldown.

name: Blazing Finisher
description: Landing a Finisher on an opponent with your Burn removes it in exchange for creating a small AoE of Fire Damage around them. Has a short Cooldown.

name: Bleed Potency
description: Increases the damage of the bleed status by x%

name: Blessing
description: Healing now has a low chance to apply various unmodified Buffs at varying potency.

name: Blood Lust
description: Hitting an opponent with Bleed grants the Buff Bloodlust. Maximum Potency of the Buff Bloodlust depends on perk amount.

name: Blood Rush
description: Your minions, when below a certain HP threshold, gains Rage and Tenacity.

name: Blood Thirsty
description: Hitting an opponent with your Bleed removes it in exchange for a Damage Boost and a slight heal. Grants Bleed potency.

name: Blub Blub
description: Your hits have a chance to repeat with a portion of their strength as Water Damage after a short delay.

name: Bombardier
description: All hits have a chance to create an explosion. You too are hit by this explosion, but at heavily reduced Damage and Stun.

name: Bomber Charge
description: The Retaliate Weapon Art now grants less Defensive utility, but instead scales off of your missing HP, Holy, and Magic Boosts. Additionally, you can now act freely during the charging phase.

name: Bomber Satchel
description: On hit with a Weapon Art, gain a stack of the neutral status Beenades. Beenades stacks are consumed by the Beenade Rune to throw additional projectiles.

name: Bomber Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which will launch four Bomber projectiles that causes large explosions. Additionally, grants the Buff Bursting.

name: Bounce Momentum
description: Jumping whilst possessing Bounce will grant you the Buff Tongue Shot for a brief duration. Tongue Shot causes you to lash at an enemy with a tongue upon using a Finisher, Stunning and rendering them temporarily immobile. Additionally increases the duration of Bounce.

name: Bowldur Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which encases yourself in a Spiritual Bowldur that grants Damage Reduction as well as enhancing your LMB's and RMB's.

name: Brawny
description: Converts a portion of other positive, offensive Boosts to Physical Boost.

name: Buckler
description: Grants an equal amount of the perk Parry. If using a one-handed weapon, also gain a cosmetic buckler in your offhand.

name: Bulfrogg Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which summons a Spiritual Bulfrogg that renders all nearby enemies immobile with a hefty Stun.

name: Bulwark
description: Ignore Stuns from Attacks below a certain threshold after accounting for modifiers. You gain a Damage Reduction against said Attacks.

name: Bumblz Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy by summoning any minion, which then summons 4 more of.

name: Buni Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which showers all nearby enemies in a flurry of kicks. All hits count as Finishers.

name: Burn Potency
description: Increases the damage of the burn status

name: Caci King Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy by holding down your Rune key, which renders you incapable of many but grants rapid Regeneration. Additionally, release disco pulses whilst doing so, which grants the Buff King's Luck to all nearby Allies. Ruler of the Sands is guaranteed to activate whilst under the effects of King's Luck.

name: Caci Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which causes you to fires off a flurry of thorns before slamming the ground thrice. Every hit inflicts Bleed.

name: Cannonball
description: Any minion you summon is stored, visible as an effect on your left hand. Using your RMB launches them forward in a damaging cannonball that releases them in an explosion. Additionally, your minions have a larger zone before they return to you.

name: Carapace
description: Gain low Protection scaling off of your Earth Boost. Additionally, gain sizable Damage Reduction and Stun Immunity if you have remaining Shield.

name: Carrying Winds
description: Take and deal more Knockback with Attacks. Additionally, moves that qualify as 'High Knockback' gains a Damage Boost and an Air Boost-scaling crit chance bonus.

name: Caster
description: Gain Rune and Weapon Art Cooldown reduction, with diminishing returns.

name: Caustic Slow
description: The Slow debuff in specific now deals a True Damage DoT that scales with Poison Potency. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Cauterize
description: All instances of Burn you inflict on opponents now instead applies Singed. Singed counts as Burn for all related effects, but instead does a burst of Fire Damage on first application rather than over time.

name: Channeled Depths
description: Gain a passively ramping, neutral Channeled Depths status. Cap and ramping speed increases with perk amount.

name: Channeled Weapon
description: All damage you deal now gains slight Magic Damage Type. Additionally, reduces Weapon Art Cooldown.

name: Cinder Soul
description: While afflicted with burn, it instead heals you and increases your movement speed. Additionally killing enemies afflicts Burn to yourself. Grants Burn Potency.

name: Civilian
description: Not equipping your weapon for 3 seconds or longer heavily boosts Rune Damage. Additionally, you can now Block without equipping your weapon.

name: Cleansed Blade
description: Using the Cleanse Weapon Art specifically grants you the Buff Oceanic Blade.

name: Cleave
description: Widen the Hitbox of all your Finishers, which also now inflicts Shatter. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against opponents with Shatter.

name: Colossus
description: Increases the size of your character, Poise Damage dealt, innate Stun Resistance, and the hitboxes of your RMB's and LMB's. You are unable to use Mounts.

name: Concealed Edge
description: Standing in shadows grants a universal Hex Damage Type, as well as increasing the range of your LMB's and RMB's.

name: Concussion
description: Gain a Poise Damage Boost and bonus Stun based on your Tenacity.

name: Contained
description: Both Debuff and Buff durations on self are increased. Does not affect neutral statuses.

name: Cosmic Ray
description: Your RMB is changed to a ranged beam.

name: Counting Sheep
description: Your Finishers inflicts Slowness on hit. Additionally, deal more Poise Damage to opponents with Slowness.

name: Crimson Tithe
description: After using your Weapon Art, consume a percentage of your current HP as True Damage to release an AoE heal that tethers all affected. Tethered Allies are additionally healed over time.

name: Critical Healing
description: Healing now has a chance to crit for more. Chance scales with Holy Boost.

name: Critical Master
description: All your crits now count as Guardbreaks. Additionally, crits gain a small Damage Boost.

name: Croakernaut Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which summons Spiritual Croakernauts that grants Reinforce to all nearby Allies.

name: Crushing Pressure
description: Gain Armor Penetration. Additionally, gain corresponding Armor Penetration scaling off of said specific Defenses of the opponent.

name: Cryo Engine
description: Gain a chance to inflict Frostbite on hits as well as converting all your Slows to it. Frostbite slows the opponent and additionally increases Air and Water Damage taken by a flat amount. Applying Frostbite grants you Tailwind.

name: Curse Rip
description: Hits against a Debuffed opponent gains Lifesteal as well as a Damage Boost that scales on the amount of unique ones on them.

name: Cursed
description: Most perk potency is increased. You now have the ability to absorb Binded Corruptions into Stored Corruptions by Destroying them in your Inventory.

name: Cursed Bark
description: Gain a small chance to inflict a random Debuff against Attackers, guaranteed if you are not Blocking. Gain Damage Reduction against opponents with Debuffs that scales on the amount of unique ones on them.

name: Cursed Experiment
description: Using your Rune below 50% HP grants the Buffs Regeneration, Critical Boost, and Hexigen at high potency, but inflicts you with the Slowness afterwards.

name: Cursed Flames
description: Burn you apply now gains a Weakening effect, with an extended duration. Additionally, it now deals and scales half as Hex.

name: Cut Down
description: Gain a Damage Boost scaling on how much % of HP the opponent has remaining.

name: Dark Harvest
description: A hit against opponents at or below 50% Guardbreaks them and deals a high amount of additional Hex Damage, alongside a slight heal. Has a Cooldown per opponent.

name: Dark Magic
description: All sources of Magic Damage gains a small amount of Hex Damage Type. Take Hex self-damage when this triggers.

name: Dark One
description: Increase the duration of Debuffs on self, but gain a Damage Boost for each unique Debuff you're afflicted with.

name: Darkening Hex
description: Hex Damage has a chance to increase the potency and duration of most Debuffs.

name: Deathmist Slash
description: Finishers sends out an additional Slash that deals Water Damage whilst healing and Cleansing other Allies. The user isn't Cleansed, and heals much less from said slash. The healing is halved if the Attack does not connect.

name: Deep Spider Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy by using a Rune, which inflicts you with Poison and the unique neutral status Anti-Venom of equal duration. Anti-Venom also increases the duration of all Poison by 50%.

name: Deepcrystal Calling
description: Cleansing Debuffs on other Allies creates a stationary Deepcrystal which periodically releases minor heals. 10 second Cooldown.

name: Defensive Stance
description: Become incapable of being Guardbroken, though with no additional innate Damage Reduction. Additionally, Gain Damage Reduction against Taunted opponents.

name: Delta Drill
description: Your M1 Finisher is repeated once per perk at a faster speed, but with less Damage and Proc Coefficient.

name: Deltabit
description: Replaces the Finisher of your LMB combo with your RMB instead. Additionally, Finishers gain a Damage Boost.

name: Dire Buni Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which causes you to teleport to a nearby opponent with an instantaneous headbutt that deals partial True Damage. Counts as a Finisher.

name: Directive
description: Your minions only swap Aggro when landing an RMB or using a Rune. The RMB causes your minions to focus solely on that opponent whilst gaining a Damage Boost in the process. The Rune causes your minions to each attack a random mob nearby whilst gaining Reinforce.

name: Divine Crash
description: RMB'ing whilst in the air teleports you down to the floor in an explosion. Scales on Holy and Air as well as your distance from the floor.

name: Divine Intervention
description: Most Buffs and Heals applied to you are copied to your minions.

name: Divinity
description: Most Finishers reduces the Cooldown of your Weapon Art by a percentage.

name: Dominating
description: Gain a Poise Damage Multiplier against enemies with Taunt.

name: Draconic Blood
description: Your Rune Infusion is locked into a Draconic Ability from the Draconic Shrine. Additional of this perk increases the Damage of your Draconic abilities. If you are not Dragon-Blooded, your Abilities are significantly weaker.

name: Draconic Runes
description: All Runes gain additional Elemental Damage Type based on your Draconic Color.

name: Dragigator Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which summons a Spiritual Dragigator to perform their Flame Blast. Inflicts Burn.

name: Dragon Breath
description: Finishers release a blast of fire that deals minor Fire Damage and inflicts Burn. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against opponents with Burn.

name: Dragon State
description: Being above a certain HP threshold makes your LMB's and RMB's send out one additional wave of damaging Magic. Scales with Dexterity, Magic and Holy, with a default Proc Coefficient.

name: Drone
description: Your minions gain a non-regenerating Shield. Minions with Shield gains Stun and Knockback immunity.

name: Dual Wielding
description: If you're using a one handed, unmodified weapon type, it changes to its corresponding dual wielding stance.

name: Duelist Stance
description: If you're using a one handed sword, your weapon type changes to Rapier.

name: Echo Blast
description: Summoning a minion shoots a damaging tornado at a nearby mob, automatically Aggro'ing the minion.

name: Echo Incineration
description: Half of your Fire Damage is converted into Air Damage and vise versa. Additionally, you have a chance to release a fiery tornado on hit that deals Fire and Air Damage whilst inflicting Burn. Grants Burn potency.

name: Emergency Exit
description: Getting hit whilst not blocking grants high potency Tailwind and slight Reinforce.

name: Emotional
description: Having only Buffs lowers your Weapon Art Cooldown and grants it additional Hex Damage Type, whilst having only Debuffs grants all attacks bonus Fire Damage Type and Attack Speed. Having both increases all healing.

name: Endless Despair
description: Heavily increase Debuff Duration and slightly increase Debuff potency.

name: Energize
description: Hitting enemies visibly builds up energy on your weapon, with an indication at max. At max, heavily boost all Weapon Art Damage, consuming all charges.

name: Engine
description: Your Speed Boost as well as the Tailwind Buff increases your Attack Speed.

name: Equipment Farmer
description: Removes crafting materials from mob drops, making it easier to obtain equipment.

name: Erosion
description: Earth Type Damage has a chance to inflict Shatter.

name: Essence Ray
description: The Magical Ray Weapon Art in specific is converted into an Essence Ray that shoots out of your forehead, which auto-aims at an eligible opponent furthest from you. You can act freely during this process.

name: Essence Totem
description: Using your Weapon Art releases pulses of healing around yourself, the duration of which scales on the Cooldown of your Weapon Art. Scales on Earth and Holy.

name: Executioner
description: Gain a Damage Boost scaling on how much % of HP the opponent has lost.

name: Exhaust
description: During and after a short duration of using your Weapon Art, every hit is guaranteed to apply Burn.

name: Explosive Charge
description: Weapon Arts causes a self-damaging explosion on hit. Additional points of this perk increase the size and Stun of the explosion.

name: Explosive Honey
description: Finishers that hit cause a ring of honey to burst out, which applies Sticky and deals a small amount of Damage. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against opponents with Sticky.

name: Extinguish
description: Your Water Damage removes Burn on enemies it hits, but gains a large Damage Boost. Healing a Burning ally will cleanse the Burn specifically and increase the heal for them.

name: Extra Layers
description: Multiplies your Protection and Warding.

name: Fell Rush
description: Inflicting any Debuff links you to the opponent. RMB'ing with a clear line of sight to said opponent will teleport you to them, dealing damage. If you also possess the perk Divine Crash, both are combined into a stronger variant.

name: Ferocity
description: Tenacity grants a Damage Multiplier.

name: Fiery Pursuit
description: Dash forward once per perk prior to activating your Weapon Art. This dash Guardbreaks, applies Burn, and grants Iframes. Counts as Weapon Art Damage.

name: Final Act
description: Using a Rune teleports all your minions back to you with a small explosion. Deaggros the opponent.

name: Flash Strike
description: Successfully Parrying an attack briefly grants the Buff Flash Strike for a brief duration. Flash Strike dramatically increases your Attack Speed.

name: Flowing Crits
description: Air Boost contributes to your crit chance.

name: Forgotten Chivalry
description: Weapon Arts or Runes that hits consumes all Reinforce you have to gain additional Holy Damage Type, Stun, and Poise Damage. Does not scale on the strength of the consumed Reinforce.

name: Fractured Energy
description: Convert all your crit chance 1:1 to a chance to inflict the debuff Fractured. Fractured stores a portion of all Damage you deal against the opponent for 5 seconds before repeating it as Magic and Earth Damage. Does not convert guaranteed crits.

name: Fragrance Aura
description: Heals with a Proc Coefficient or from consumables grants you the neutral status Fragrant Aura.

name: Fragrant Flesh
description: Dealing Water Type Damage has a chance to make you Bleed. If you're already Bleeding, instead gain Regeneration.

name: Frenzy
description: Rage grants a Movement Speed and universal Damage Multiplier, but cuts healing recieved in half and also multiplies Damage taken.

name: Frequent Flier
description: Gain a Damage Boost whilst airborne. Hold Space while midair to activate an indefinite slow fall.

name: Frostbite
description: Gain a chance to inflict Slowness on hit. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against opponents with either Slowness or Frostbite.

name: Frozen Heart
description: Increases Physical and Magic Defense as well as Warding scaling on your Cold Resistance.

name: Frozen Waste
description: Blocking an Attack causes an AoE that inflicts Slowness and deals very high Stun and Poise Damage.

name: Fungal Prototype
description: Weapon Arts or Runes that hit creates a lingering cloud of Poison that inflicts Poison and deals Hex Damage over time. The damage scales on which created it.

name: Fury
description: Increases the duration of all forms of Rage.

name: Future Sight
description: After going a short while without being hit, gain a stack of Autododge. Additionally, dodging an attack via an external source will temporarily restore this perk's own Autododge briefly.

name: Gale Bursts
description: Most Finishers sends out an equal amount of air missiles with reduced Proc Coefficient.

name: Gaseous Smash
description: Weapon attacks that slams into itself or the floor creates a cloud of lingering Poison, which inflicts Poison and deals Hex Damage over time.

name: Gelid Lance
description: When you inflict Slowness, also inflict Bleed. Grants Water scaling to Bleed, and gain a Damage Boost against Bleeding opponents. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Ghastly Rot
description: Gain a high chance to inflict the Ghastly Rot Debuff on hit. Ghastly Rot causes any Attack against the opponent to have a chance to inflict Poison. Additionally, your Poison now deals True Damage instead of Hex.

name: Glacial Buildup
description: Dealing damage applies ice crystals which add small water damage and flat poise damage to your attacks, upon reaching enough stacks or poise breaking the opponent shatter the crystals deal damage and high poise damage.

name: Gladiatorial Rage
description: Halves Rage Rune Cooldown and adds a flat potency increase to all sources and forms of Rage. Rage duration is increased on kill only, and gain Armor Penetration scaling off of your highest offensive Boost.

name: Glyph Conduit
description: Upon landing an RMB or using a Rune, gain the Buff Glyph Conduit.

name: Gnawing Poison
description: Using a Finisher bites all enemies you have Poisoned, dealing a burst of Hex Damage. Has a Cooldown and a Proc Coefficient. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Golden Crits
description: 40% of crits has a chance to have their Damage increased even further.

name: Golem Guillotine
description: Finishers that slam the ground creates a fissure-like shockwave that reaches ahead and behind yourself, dealing Earth Damage.

name: Gorecast
description: Weapon Arts that deal Magic or Physical Damage inflicts Bleed, and Weapon Arts gain a Damage Boost against Bleeding opponents. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Grandmagic Guard
description: Blocking creates a shielding bubble that knocks away enemies with minor Magic Damage whilst granting all Allies Magic Reinforce.

name: Gravitational Enforcer
description: Pull opponents towards you with high Stun and Shatter infliction prior to activating your RMB, but increases RMB Cooldown.

name: Gravity Well
description: Create an inverse shockwave that pulls in enemies towards you prior to Weapon Art or Rune activation.

name: Gremlin Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy by inflicting Bleed, causing a giant spear to land on the opponent after a delay. Guardbreaks and has a Proc Coefficient.

name: Grounded Despair
description: Jumping and landing creates a small Hex shockwave, inflicting yourself with the Debuff Despair. The shockwave has a Proc Coefficient.

name: Guardian Spin
description: Empowers the Spin Weapon Art in specific with Bastion Energy, increasing its Damage and Range significantly.

name: Guiding Winds
description: Constantly moving activates a state that steadily builds up potencies of Tailwind and similarily grants a ramping Damage Boost.

name: Hardened Will
description: Low chance to heavily reduce Damage taken and ignore all Stun from an external Attack.

name: Heal Boost
description: You gain bonus healing.

name: Healing Arts
description: Using a Weapon Art or Rune grants Regeneration, the duration of which scales on the Cooldown of the activator. Weapon Arts' account for only the Cooldown after Modifiers, while Runes account before Modifiers.

name: Heat Drill
description: Converts the Lunge and Barrage Weapon Arts in specific into a teleporting dash followed by fiery explosions.

name: Heavy Gravitate
description: Hitting an opponent with either Earth or Magic Damage from a Weapon Art or Rune applies the debuff Heavy Gravity. Heavy Gravity reduces movement speed, and can be consumed upon using your RMB to deal Damage and heavy Poise Damage.

name: Heavy Slate
description: Ignore Knockback from Attacks below a certain threshold of Stun after accounting for modifiers, after which you release a burst of Earth. Has a 0.5 second Cooldown.

name: Heightened Reflexes
description: On kill or Poisebreak, gain a stack of the Buff Autoparry. Autoparry automatically activates whilst Blocking, and has increased Stun if you possess the perk Parry itself.

name: Hemorrhage
description: Hitting a Bleeding opponent adds a Damage and Poise Damage Boost, Stun, and a small amount of True Damage Type.

name: Hex Ray
description: Inflicting Debuffs that possesses a Weakening effect fires a ray of Hex at them. Has no Cooldown

name: Hex Shield
description: Every 10 seconds, gain a stack of the neutral status Hex Shield per perk amount.

name: Highlander
description: Weapon Arts and Runes gain a Damage Boost and slight Armor Piercing.

name: Holy Tides
description: Cleansing a Debuff on any Ally applies Regeneration. Additionally, all heals you receive or grant gains bonus Water and Holy Scaling.

name: Honey Arts
description: Using a Weapon Art fires a blast of honey that deals Damage to mobs nearby, which inflicts Sticky. The amount of mobs it can target increases with Cooldown.

name: Honey Gather
description: Gain Lifesteal against opponents with Sticky.

name: Hypnotist
description: Weapon Arts and Runes inflicts the debuff Hypnotized. Hypnotized decreases Armor against all Magic Damage Types, and renders the applier incapable of drawing Aggro of the victim.

name: Ice Barge
description: Speed reductions from Slowing effects and Stuns are reduced, and gain a Damage Reduction whilst inflicted with them. Additionally, your run is not cancelled by said Stuns, and gain Slowness for a short duration upon your Block being hit.

name: Ice Burst
description: Applying Shatter creates an icicle burst that inflicts brief Bleed and does Water and Physical Damage in a radius.

name: Icestorm
description: Landing 10 hits in a short timeframe creates an ice storm to orbit around you, which inflicts Slow. Does not possess a Proc Coefficient.

name: Ichor Spark
description: Gain a chance to create a damaging red chain lightning on hit, which Lifesteals. Additionally, allows you to hold RMB to charge and fire a large, ranged slash attack.

name: Ignition
description: Gain a small chance to inflict Burn and deal bonus Fire Damage on hit. Grants Burn potency.

name: Immovable
description: Reduce received Knockback and increase Physical Defense scaling off of your Tenacity.

name: Infection
description: When Poison inflicted by you ticks down, it deals slight Hex Damage and applies Poison to a nearby, non-poisoned opponent. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Inhuman Swings
description: Your LMB's and RMB's Attack Speed scales with the average value of your Physical and Dexterity Boost.

name: Inoculation
description: Taking direct, self-inflicted damage heals you for a portion of said damage added with a flat value.

name: Inspiration
description: LMB's and RMB's that land releases pulses that slightly heal and grants the Buff Inspiration. The pulse does not possess a Proc Coefficient and the heal is doubly as effective on minions.

name: Investigator
description: Makes you really good at investigating.

name: Iron Bounce
description: Have a chance to gain Bounce on LMB's and RMB's. Additionally, gain Reinforce when gaining Bounce.

name: Iron Slayer Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy in the form of an Iron Slayer's roar by gaining Rage, which doubles the Rage's duration and increases its potency by a flat 0.2. The roar inflicts Weakeness.

name: Juggernaut
description: Gain a Damage Boost alongside Stun and Knockback Resistance scaling off of your negative Speed and Attack Speed Boosts. Has no effect if they are positive.

name: Kama Blades
description: If you're using a dagger, your weapon type changes to dual kamas. If you're using a spear, your weapon type becomes a scythe.

name: Kindling
description: Your Burn damage is much higher, but has a much shorter duration.

name: Lance
description: If you’re using a greatsword or unbalanced sword, then your weapon changes into a lance.

name: Life Drinker
description: Gain Lifesteal on damage done by DoTs. Additionally, increase the duration of all DoTs.

name: Lifesteal
description: Heal for a portion of Damage dealt.

name: Light Bearer
description: Hits with LMB's or RMB's has a chance to release a healing pulse. Possesses a Proc Coefficient.

name: Lithic Veil
description: Healing any Ally grants the Buff Lithic Veil. Lithic Veil grants flat Physical Damage and Stun Reduction.

name: Locked And Loaded
description: If you're using a one handed weapon type, gain a gun in your offhand that replaces your RMB. Possesses unique interactions at multiple of the perk, and with the Monk guild.

name: Lodestone Barrage
description: Using a Rune fires a barrage of rocks at nearby mobs. The amount of rocks fired scales on the base Cooldown.

name: Lucky
description: If most chance-based effects fails to proc, reroll it at a reduced percentage up to (perk amount) of times. However, grants reduced innate Protection, Warding, and Tenacity.

name: Luminescent Fervor
description: Healing Allies grants the Buff Luminescent Fervor. Luminescent Fervor grants additional Holy Damage Type that counts as your Damage for Kill Credit.

name: Mage Rage
description: Rage now applies on Pure Magic Type Damage, and grants Rune Cooldown Reduction. Additionally, slightly multiplies your Rage Potency.

name: Mageling Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy by using a Weapon Art or Rune, which resets the cooldown of the activator. Additionally, this envelopes your character in a protective Mageling that Blocks Attacks and performs its Radial Burst.

name: Magic Circuit
description: Using a Rune emits damaging chain lightning from your character. The strength of the lightning scales on the Cooldown.

name: Magic Guard
description: Release a shockwave of strong Magic Damage when you Block an attack. Has a Proc Coefficient and a Cooldown.

name: Magic Surge
description: You have a chance to reset your Weapon Art cooldown on Weapon Art usage. Each failed reset increases the chance of the next.

name: Marsh Flow
description: Each individual hit of a Finisher has a chance to grant Regeneration. Additionally, having Regeneration grants a Damage Boost.

name: Melting Shred
description: All DoTs now gain additional True Damage Type. Additionally, opponents inflicted with your DoTs are also inflicted with the Debuff Anti Heal. Anti Heal reduces any and all incoming healing

name: Melting Slime
description: The Sticky Debuff you apply now causes the mob to take 20% more Fire and Earth Damage, alongside a Fire/Earth and Poise Damage DoT that scales with Fire and Earth boost.

name: Mine
description: Your RMB is replaced with a string of pickaxe-like Finisher Attacks that can be held down, the last hit of which inflicts Shatter. Overrides other RMB-modifying perks.

name: Minion Absorption
description: Minions summoned are instantly consumed to grant the Buff Minion Absorbed if you don't possess it already. Minion Absorbed heals you based on the strength of the consumed minion, and grants a Damage Boost equal to a portion of your Summon Boost.

name: Money Smart
description: Gain extra Voxos on kill, and gain a Damage Boost scaling on how much Voxos you have. Maxes out at the Voxos limit.

name: Mortal Will
description: Finishers gain increased Holy Scaling and Holy Damage Type.

name: Mounted Defense
description: While mounted on the Glacial Snapper Mount specifically, you gain Damage Reduction.

name: Mycotic Bloom
description: Enemies you have Poisoned are inflicted with Slow over 50%. Enemies below 50% take more damage from Poison instead.

name: Ocean Song
description: Using your Weapon Art creates a brief area around yourself that cleanses and heals Allies. Scales on Water, Dexterity, and the cooldown of your Weapon Art.

name: Oceans Rage
description: Rage now applies on Water Type Damage, and increases incoming healing. Additionally, slightly multiplies your Rage Potency.

name: Packaged Power
description: Gain a Damage and Outgoing Healing Boost based on how full your Inventory is. Maxes out at 250 items.

name: Pain Distribution
description: A portion of your Damage taken is divided between all your minions as Hex Damage. Additionally, your minions have increased HP.

name: Parry
description: Perform a Parry before Blocking, which can defend against Guardbreaks. However, a missed Parry increases your Block Cooldown.

name: Penance
description: Gain a Damage Boost scaling on how little HP you have left, which maxes out at 25%. Additionally, whilst at 25% or lower, all hits have a 50% chance to inflict Bleed.

name: Perfection
description: Dodging or parrying, grants a stack of the Buff Perfection, it increases your speed, critical chance and damage. Taking damage that wasnt parried or dodged reduces a stack.

name: Perk Effectiveness
description: Increases the potency of most perks.

name: Phalanx Stab
description: Finishers are faster and gains one additional stab that has a chance to inflict Bleed.

name: Phantom Pain
description: All attacks now repeats a portion of their Damage after a short delay. Does not possess a Proc Coefficient.

name: Photosynthesis
description: Gain a boost to your Holy and Earth Damage as well as healing whilst standing in Sunlight.

name: Piercer
description: Finishers now output their damage entirely as True Damage, and gains a Damage Boost. If your weapon type is specifically a one-handed sword, spear, dagger, fists, or rapier, the Damage Boost is doubly as effective.

name: Poison Acceleration
description: Being Poisoned grants a Speed and Attack Speed Boost, alongside Weapon Art and Rune Cooldown Reduction.

name: Poison Potency
description: Increases the damage of the poisoned status

name: Poisonous
description: Gain a small chance to inflict Poison and deal bonus Hex Damage on hit.

name: Possession
description: Hitting a mob with a Weapon Art or Rune marks them for Possession. If the mob is killed with the mark, and you possess enough of a combination of this perk and Summon Boost, they can revive as your minion.

name: Potion Chugger
description: Increases the speed at which you drink potions, and increases their effectiveness by 10% per.

name: Power Inhale
description: You can now hold your Weapon Art key to charge prior to activation, which increases the speed of the Weapon Art. Additionally, if held to completion, teleport to the nearest opponent in front of you, dealing some additional damage.

name: Power Surge
description: Hitting enemies with LMB's and RMB's lowers your Rune Cooldown by a flat amount, once per attack.

name: Primal
description: Heavily reduce crit chance. But crit chance is additionally converted into a raw Damage Multiplier.

name: Propelling Fun
description: Jumping creates an air current that grants all Allies the Buff Cloudpush. Cloudpush grants bonus Air Damage Type that counts as your damage. Whilst afflicted with Burn, jumping actiavtes Cinderpull' instead which grants bonus Fire Damage Type.

name: Protector Spirit
description: Gain a miniature Bastion Spirit that assists with LMB and RMB damage at above half HP, but instead reduces incoming Damage and Stun with a Cooldown when below. Both effects are active at once at higher perk amounts.

name: Proto Tech
description: Ocassionally emit Poison chain lightning from your character.

name: Pulverizing Rush
description: Continuing to hold LMB after the last hit of your LMB combo will cause you to repeatedly slam the ground as you move. This creates an AoE of Damage but disables Blocking, Weapon Art and Rune usage, as well as having a lower Proc Coefficient.

name: Pure Rot
description: Cleanses no longer removes Debuffs, but instead grants any Ally the Buff Rotted.

name: Pursuit
description: Reduces the damage of your LMB combo. In turn, removes all Knockback from it, and replaces the Finisher with a loop back to the first hit of your combo.

name: Pyre Bloom
description: Upon using a Weapon Art, summon a stationary Pyrebloom minion that shoots igniting fireballs at nearby opponents. Their damage counts as Weapon Art damage, and shares the same Buffs as you. If the Weapon Art summoned a minion, spawn an additional Pyrebloom. Grants Burn potency.

name: Quake
description: Gain a small chance to create an Earth shockwave around the mob you hit, dealing additional Earth Damage and Stun alongside Knockback.

name: Quarry
description: Hitting an opponent builds up the neutral status Hidden Treasure on them. At 4 stacks of this status, deal a burst of Holy and Physical Damage. Has a Cooldown per opponent.

name: Queen Bumblz Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy upon summoning a minion in the form of a Spiritual Queen Bee, which hovers over your character and fires blasts of honey at nearby enemies. The honey blasts inflicts Sticky and possesses a Proc Coefficient.

name: Queens Guard
description: Your minions gain a HP and Speed Boost. Additionally, gain Reinforce when you summon a minion.

name: Queens Power
description: Upon summoning a minion, grants the Buff Queens Power.

name: Quick Witted
description: Increases your Dexterity Boost scaling off of your Speed Boost.

name: Quickcast
description: Cast most Weapon Arts much faster. Additionally, take slightly reduced Stun whilst actively using a Weapon Art.

name: Quickdraw
description: Upon equipping your weapon, gain a neutral status titled Quickdraw for a brief duration.

name: Quicksand
description: Using your Weapon Art creates a pool of quicksand, which deals continous damage. Half the hits count as Weapon Art Damage, and has a reduced Proc Coefficient.

name: Rabbits Foot
description: Small chance to dodge incoming Damage. Additionally, increases IFrames of your base Roll.

name: Radiance
description: Most heals now deal Holy Damage in a radius, which is affected by your Holy Boost and Outgoing Healing modifiers.

name: Raging Bounce
description: Gain a Damage Boost when under the effects of Bounce.

name: Rainstorm
description: Gain a chance to create a Raindrop in the general vicinity on hit, which cleanses and heals Allies but Damages opponents.

name: Reaper
description: Gain a Damage Boost against enemies with Debuffs. Scales on the amount of unique Debuffs the opponent has, alongside perk amount.

name: Reinforced Block
description: Decreases Damage taken from an Attack that failed to Guardbreak you.

name: Rejuvenating Flame
description: Passively heal other Allies around you scaling on perk amount and Fire Boost, and grant them the Cinder Surge Buff. The effectiveness of both are multiplied if you are Burning. The passive heal lacks a Proc Coefficient.

name: Revel In Death
description: Whenever a minion of yours dies, gain a heal based off of their base HP. Said heal is reduced if they were not actively killed.

name: Rider
description: Whilst mounted, gain a Damage Boost and reduce incoming Stun by a flat amount.

name: Righted Wrongs
description: Gain Dexterity and Speed Boost scaling off of all of your negative stats combined. Negative Physical and Magic Defenses in specific are taken into account doubly.

name: Roaring Heads
description: Gain a high chance on hit to self-inflict a variety of Debuffs. Each unique Debuff grants an Attack Speed Bonus, and every tenth self-inflicted Debuff releases a roar that deals damage and Stuns. Additionally, gain a large amount of negative Warding, but reduce the effects of Weakeness and Shatter.

name: Rocky Body
description: Increases your Physical Defense scaling off of your Earth Boost.

name: Roguent Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with your RMB, which throws a spray of splinters in front of you. These splinters are guaranteed to crit and only takes partial Spiritual Energy to use, but can only be activated at max stacks.

name: Rotating Blades
description: Your LMB's and RMB's hit twice as much, but have slightly reduced Damage and Proc Coefficient.

name: Royal Finisher
description: Release a damaging wave of Magic once per Finisher.

name: Royal Parry
description: A successful Parry grants you the buff Critical Boost. Critting due to the effects of said Buff will add an additional Damage Boost.

name: Ruler Of The Sands
description: Using a Weapon Art or Rune has a chance to summon a sandnado, the chance of which scales on the base Cooldown.

name: Runic Blades
description: Weapon Arts or Runes marks the opponent with the debuff Runic Blades. Hits against said opponent launches Magical Blades at them, with a very short Cooldown.

name: Runic Winds
description: Using a Rune grants Tailwind. Additionally, gain Rune Cooldown Reduction whilst under the effects of Tailwind.

name: Sacred Grounds
description: Using a Rune causes a holy cross to fall after a short delay, which heals and grants Reinforce. Scales on Holy, Magic, and the Cooldown of said Rune.

name: Sacrificial Summoning
description: Reduces the decay rate of minions, but applies Poison to yourself on summon. Additionally, taking Hex Damage heals all your minions for a percentage of their Max HP.

name: Sandy Wounds
description: Bleed now instead scales on Air and Earth, and scales better. Additionally, Bleed has a longer Duration.

name: Savage Combo
description: Each LMB grants the following hit of the combo a Damage Boost. Resets after the LMB combo ends or repeats.

name: Saw Heart
description: If you're using an unmodified fist Weapon type, your hands grow chainsaw blades, modifying your Weapon type to Chain Fists that has an innate chance to apply Shatter and Bleed on LMB's and RMB's.

name: Saw Stance
description: If you're using an unmodified, two-handed sword weapon type, your weapon type changes to a Chainsaw stance that has an innate chance to inflict Shatter and Bleed on LMB's and RMB's.

name: Scourge
description: Gain a chance for any hit to count as a Guardbreak and gain a Damage Boost. Additionally, True Damage becomes affected by Rage.

name: Screeching Sound
description: Blocking an Attack has a chance to create a small shockwave of Air that deals slight Damage, Stuns, and Taunts nearby opponents.

name: Seismic Momentum
description: Your crit chance and Damage now scales on your Earth Boost instead of Dexterity Boost.

name: Serrated Edge
description: Finishers gain a Damage Boost and inflicts Bleed.

name: Shamanic Flow
description: LMB's and RMB's slightly lowers the Cooldown of your Weapon Art on hit, once per attack.

name: Sharp Claws
description: Guardbreaks inflicts Bleed and the Debuff Wound. Wound causes Bleed to gain additional True Damage Type as well as slight Stun. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Sharp Crits
description: Physical Boost contributes to your crit chance. Additionally, crits gain slight Armor Piercing.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Gain a Damage Boost when striking enemies from range.

name: Shattering Justice
description: Hitting a Poisebroken opponent, or breaking the Guard of a Blocking opponent, inflicts strong Shatter and Stuns for longer.

name: Shielding Gong
description: Finishers that land with Allies nearby creates a small burst that grants low duration and potency Reinforce. Additionally, Reinforce now grants Knockback Resistance.

name: Sickly Sweetness
description: Gain a chance to inflict Sticky against Attackers. Gain Damage Reduction against opponents inflicted with Sticky.

name: Sickness
description: Gain a chance to sneeze randomly, dealing Damage as well as inflicting a green variant of Sticky. Green Sticky increases all Hex Damage taken by 20%.

name: Siphoning Rot
description: Heal when others take Damage from your Poison. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Slayer Rage
description: The Rage and Weakening Roar Runes in specific can now be held down, which deals Hex Damage to you and around yourself and grants ramping Rage to self or Weakening to opponents.

name: Slow Leak
description: Bleed you inflict lasts much longer. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Smoldering
description: Using a Weapon Art applies Burn to yourself. While Burning, gain a Damage Boost.

name: Snoeman Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which conjures a much larger ice storm around yourself.

name: Solar Light
description: Converts the Lesser Heal Weapon Art in specific to a holdable beam of light from above, which targets the Ally closest to your cursor excluding minions. Said beam of light enhances in attributes when standing in the Sun, or when under the effects of the Buff Sun Blessed.

name: Spark
description: Crit Damage gains a large, additive Damage Boost if the opponent is Burning.

name: Spell Piercer
description: Upon critting with a Weapon Art or Rune, deal bonus Damage and ignore 100% of the opponent's Defenses.

name: Spell Slinger
description: Magic Boost contributes to your crit chance.

name: Spellshield
description: Gain Protection based on your Magic Boost and Defense.

name: Spirit Commune
description: LMB's, RMB's, mob kills and Poisebreaks grants Spiritual Energy. Spiritual Energy can be released in various forms, depending on the glove.

name: Spirit Winds
description: The Tailwind Buff grants you a universal Damage Boost. Additionally a portion of all Air Type Damage is converted to Magic Type Damage during so.

name: Splinter
description: Crits inflict brief Bleed, has increased Stun, and deal more damage to bleeding opponents. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Spore Burst
description: Finisher that land releases a burst of spores which inflicts Poison to opponents and yourself. Additionally, take heavily reduced damage from Poison. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Spore Trooper
description: Gain a neutral, ramping status titled Stored Sporelings , the maximum of which scales on perk amount. Additionally, more of this perk increases the size of the Sporelings.

name: Spring Powered
description: Gain a Damage Boost scaling off of your Jump Boost. Additionally, using your base Roll grants brief Bounce.

name: Spring Step
description: Using a Weapon Art grants you Bounce.

name: Springblast
description: Being under the effects of Bounce causes your Finishers to create an explosion. Additionally, Blocking attacks has a chance to grant Bounce.

name: Standoff
description: Whilst standing still, gain a ramping Damage Boost. Additionally, landing hits also grants ramping Regeneration.

name: Star Barrage
description: Using a Weapon Art grants you the Buff Star Mode for a brief duration. Star Mode greatly increases Attack Speed.

name: Star Friendship
description: Healing an Ally grants them the Buff Friendship. Friendship grants high Weapon Art Cooldown reduction, and is consumed after activation.

name: Star Struck
description: LMB's and RMB's that lands has a very high chance to shoot a star of varying Damage Types and Scalings at the opponent. Has a lowered Proc Coefficient.

name: Static Buildup
description: Hitting enemies visibly builds up a yellow charge on your Weapon. Landing an RMB calls down multiple lightning strikes, the amount of which scales off of your charge.

name: Stealth
description: Lowers your detection range for opponents, and gain a chance not to draw Aggro on hit. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against enemies that aren't targeting you.

name: Steam Charge
description: Inflicting Burn on either yourself or an opponent ramps up the neutral status Steam Buildup. At max stacks, your RMB is instead replaced with a gargantuan blast of steam that counts as a Finisher.

name: Steam Powered
description: Gain a universal Damage Boost scaling off of your Air Boost, but in turn gain a chance to take minor Fire Damage and set yourself on Fire upon dealing any.

name: Sticky Guard
description: Gain Reinforce when hitting an opponent with Sticky.

name: Sticky Summons
description: Your minions gain Magic Defense and a chance to inflict Sticky on hit.

name: Sticky Swings
description: Gain a chance to inflict Sticky on LMB's and RMB's, and gain a Damage Bonus against enemies with Sticky. Additionally, convert all instances of Slowness you inflict to Sticky instead.

name: Stone Weapon
description: Grants a hefty amount of Earth Damage Type on your Weapon, but reduces Attack Speed accordingly. This reduction can be mitigated by Earth Boost.

name: Stoneskin
description: Gain high Damage Reduction and Hyperarmor whilst casting a Weapon Art, and for a short duration afterwards.

name: Stored Corruption
description: Increases the duration of Debuffs you inflict and receive. Additionally, all Damage you receive is granted a small Multiplier.

name: Storm Caster
description: Your LMB's and RMB's are replaced with chained lightning blasts.

name: Storm Rend
description: Gain a chance to create chain lighting and inflict the DebuffElectrical Rend on hit. Electrical Rend reduces Armor and Stun Resistance by a small amount.

name: Stormcaller
description: Gain a low chance to strike enemies with lightning on hit.

name: Stratos Winds
description: Your LMB's and RMB's are replaced with ranged Tornadoes.

name: Strong Tides
description: Increases your Water Boost based on your Physical Boost.

name: Sunburn
description: Gain a universal Damage Boost against Burning opponents. If an attack contains Holy Damage Type, gain yet another Damage Boost, and a chance to inflict Burn.

name: Swarm
description: Doubles the amount of summoned minions, but they are overall weaker. Additionally, increases your Summon Cap by 1 and reduces the weakening penalty per perk.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: Your minions gain a stacking chance to apply Sticky. Their hits against enemies already inflicted with Sticky removes it, but will deal bonus Damage and heal them for a % of their max HP.

name: Swift Guard
description: Increases your Physical Defense scaling off of your Dexterity Boost. Additionally, gain Reinforce when you Dodge an Attack.

name: Tailwind
description: Using your Weapon Art grants the Buff Tailwind. Additionally, increases the potency of all Tailwind, regardless of source.

name: Tectonic Heat
description: Gain a chance on hit to spout a magma ball out of the opponent. Gains a massive chance boost on a Guardbreaking Attack.

name: Tempest
description: Launch a tornado on most hits of Finishers with greatly reduced Proc Coefficient.

name: Thief Training
description: Damage dealt whilst standing behind an opponent will always crit and gain a Damage Boost, but crits deal less damage than usual when below 3 of this perk. If an attack would've crit regardless, gain another Damage Boost. Additionally, halve your base Roll cooldown and improves its attributes.

name: Thorns
description: Gain a chance to release thorns that deals light Damage and applies Bleed when you are hit, guaranteed if you are Blocking. Grants Bleed Potency.

name: Toadzerker Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, which conjurers a Spiritual Toadzerker that leaps into the air before slamming down in a large AoE. Additionally, grants Rage and Bounce on activation.

name: Torpedo Barrage
description: Gain stacks of the neutral status Torpedos when hitting an opponent. Hitting an opponent with a Weapon Art or Rune begins to drain your Torpedos until empty, dealing Physical and Water Damage.

name: Toxin Caster
description: Magic Damage from Weapon Arts or Runes Poisons the opponent. Additionally, Weapon Arts and Runes gains a Damage Boost scaling off of your Poison Potency.

name: Toxin Transfer
description: Hitting an opponent whilst Poisoned inflicts Poison and adds a small amount of Hex Damage Type. Grants Poison Potency.

name: Trickster
description: A high chance to reflect Debuffs inflicted on you back at the inflictor at an increased potency. Grants Poison, Burn, and Bleed Potency.

name: Trophy Hunter
description: Removes equipment from mob drops, making it easier to obtain crafting materials.

name: True Balance
description: Your Hex and Holy Boosts are averaged out, then increased by 66%. All healing is now boosted scaling off of your Hex Boost, and all Damage is now boosted scaling off of your Holy Boost. Additionally, applying a Debuff grants you a corresponding Buff.

name: True Moon
description: Converts a portion of Magic Damage Type to True Damage Type. Additionally, gain a chance to shoot a True Damage moon at the opponent on hit. Has a heavily reduced Proc Coefficient.

name: Trusty Servant
description: Minions no longer decay and gains a Damage, Health and Tenacity Multiplier, but you may only have one minion at a time. Additional points of this perk makes your minions larger, increasing their attributes.

name: Turtle
description: One-fifth chance per perk to automatically Block a non-Guardbreaking Attack.

name: Undead Might
description: Weapon Arts and Runes gain a sizable Damage Boost, but take Earth and Hex self damage if it lands.

name: Undying Rot
description: Poison instead heals you and grants Damage Reduction.

name: Unmoving
description: Attackers take Stun and Poise Damage based on your Tenacity. Additionally, constantly inflict yourself with Slow.

name: Untethered
description: Heavily reduce all movement restrictions from various actions.

name: Valor
description: If you're using a one handed weapon or spear, gain a shield in your offhand which further reduces damage taken through Block. Additionally, Weapon Arts inflict Taunt, and gain a Damage Boost against Taunted enemies.

name: Vampire
description: Gain a Damage Boost and Reduction in the shadows. However, said Damage Boost is halved, Damage Reduction completely lost, and recieve half as much healing overall whilst in Sunlight. Additionally, lose the ability to heal in inns, but instead heal from killing or Poisebreaking mobs.

name: Vapor Aegis
description: The Reinforce Buff in specific grants you immense Damage Reduction against Fire and Water Type Damage. Additionally, increases the duration of Reinforce.

name: Vassals Croak
description: Gain a Damage Boost scaling on the amount of active minions. When your minions die, gain a stack of the neutral status Last Croak. Last Croak grants Rage to you on consumption.

name: Venom Eater
description: Landing a hit on an opponent with your Poison removes it in exchange for a guaranteed crit, Bonus Damage, and a slight heal. However, reduce overall Crit Damage at low perk amounts.

name: Venom Spitter
description: Your Finishers shoots out a venomous blast that inflicts Poison. Additionally, gain a Damage Boost against Poisoned opponents.

name: Vicious Edge
description: Gain a chance to inflict Bleed on LMB's and RMB's. Gain a Damage Bonus against Bleeding opponents.

name: Vile Presence
description: Passively deal low Hex Damage to nearby mobs.

name: Virulent Core
description: Your LMB's and RMB's are replaced with poisonous blasts that inflicts Poison.

name: Vital Mist
description: All sources of Lifesteal are instead consumed to build up charges of the neutral status Vital Mist. Vital Mist is passively consumed to heal Allies in an AoE and, at or above 50 charge, gains increased AoE and grants Tailwind. This doubles the consumption of the status, alongside when Blocking.

name: Vital Strikes
description: Increase crit Damage.

name: Void Contract
description: Occasionally mark a random mob nearby, which expires after a short period or a couple of hits. Can only be consumed by the applicant, but counts as a Debuff for others.

name: Void Rage
description: Rage additionally grants bonus Hex Damage Type to all sources of Damage, as well as granting Stun Resistance.

name: Void Root Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with an RMB, conjuring a Spiritual Void Root to barrage enemies with bites that have a chance to inflict random Debuffs on hit.

name: Volatile Shell
description: When your Shield is depleted completely, cause a poisonous explosion that scales on Protection and Hex Boost. Additionally, Shield now absorbs a larger percentage of damage received.

name: Voltaic Body
description: Using your Weapon Art grants you the Buff Voltaic Body, but increases your Rune Cooldown. The potency of the Buff Voltaic Body increases each activation, and is reduced every second.

name: Wall
description: Blocking releases pulses around yourself that grants other Allies the neutral status Redirect. Redirect sends a portion of most Damage they take to you.

name: Warden Of Many
description: Gaining Reinforce grants your minions Autoblock, scaling off of the duration of said Reinforce.

name: Warding Tides
description: Abilities that can cleanse Debuffs now also grants Reinforce.

name: Wave Rider
description: Gain a ramping Wave Rider status, which can be accelerated by healing any Ally with a cleansing heal and maxes out at 100. At max, your next Weapon Art or RMB will be empowered by water. If it empowered your Weapon Art, largely reduce its Cooldown once in addition.

name: Weakening
description: Small chance to apply Weakeness on hit.

name: Weight Distribution
description: Your Physical and Dexterity Boosts are averaged out, then slightly multiplied. Additionally, makes your LMB's and RMB's slow you less whilst Attacking.

name: Weighty Slam
description: Converts the Slam Weapon Art in specific into a meaty, jumping slam. This modified Slam gains Hyperarmor during Windup, a Damage Boost, and only does Physical Damage.

name: Whirl Foot
description: Increases your Speed Boost scaling off of your Air Boost, and gain a chance to Dodge based on your movement speed. Additionally, gain Tailwind when you Dodge an Attack.

name: Whirlwind
description: Converts all Tailwind to the buff Whirlwind, with an increased duration. Whirlwind. Additionally, using a Weapon Art or Rune release a wind slash around yourself that inflicts Bleed.

name: Wild Bolt
description: Enhances every aspect of the the Laser Weapon Art in specific, but causes it to become a random Elemental Damage Type (except True) and inflict a random Debuff on hit.

name: Wildfire
description: Most DoTs deals their damage in an AoE.

name: Wind Drill
description: Replaces your base Roll with a controllable, gravity-defying dash that releases pulses of damage as it goes.

name: Wind Walker
description: While under the effects of Tailwind, your Weapon Arts deal increased Knockback and gains some Armor Penetration. Additionally, Tailwind lasts longer.

name: Winter Woof Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy with a howl on RMB as two Spiritual Winter Woofs, which causes you to inflict Bleed with each hit. The howl inflicts Shatter.

name: Woof Spirit
description: Release your Spiritual Energy as a large howl on RMB, which inflicts Weakness.

name: Wrathful Crits
description: When you crit, gain Rage for a brief duration.
